svg.text: manages sessions, timing, wraps final output
① if session_id → read history from SessionStore
deterministic pipeline — no LLM for its own decisions
Keyword classification → TaskSpec { type, complexity, risk }
TaskSpec → RuntimePolicy { budget, tools, iterations, scope }
Budget-aware admission: full | trimmed | rejected → system prompt
Produces the actual content. Iterates until FinalAnswer or limit.
gate → broker → signal → next model call
ToolCalls → gate → broker → signal → loop ModelError → retry / count
③ if session_id → write turn to SessionStore
{ content, run_id, trace_id, termination, diagnostics, duration_ms }
called from within ExecutionLoop per iteration
ModelAdapter Protocol: send(ModelRequest) → FinalAnswer | ToolCalls | ModelError
CLAWBOUND_PROVIDER / CLAWBOUND_MODEL env overrides · key isolation
Engine.run() → read history → run_orchestrator(Stages 1-4) → write turn → EngineResponse
Stage 4 (ExecutionLoop) is the core — it produces the content via Provider calls
SessionStore is a side-channel for persistence, not a transformation stage
